name: src/provider layout (V1)
description: Phase 1 lands under src/provider/. types.ts holds the SandboxProfile + SpawnCommand + SpawnResult contract (SPEC §8.3, §9). src/provider/local/ has the LocalProvider primitives: bwrap.ts (Linux argv), seatbelt.ts (macOS .sb profile + argv), env.ts (resolveSandboxEnv shared by both), sandbox.ts (cross-platform runSandboxed dispatcher with platform fanout). The BurrowProvider interface itself lands later — Phase 1 is just the wrappers.
